endpoints.name: GET /v1/{conversionWorkspace}:describeDatabaseEntities
endpoints.description: Describes the database entities tree for a specific conversion workspace and a specific tree type. Database entities are not resources like conversion workspaces or mapping rules, and they can't be created, updated or deleted. Instead, they are simple data objects describing the structure of the client database.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CONVERSIONWORKSPACE}} with a real conversionworkspace.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{conversionWorkspace}:searchBackgroundJobs
endpoints.description: Searches/lists the background jobs for a specific conversion workspace. The background jobs are not resources like conversion workspaces or mapping rules, and they can't be created, updated or deleted. Instead, they are a way to expose the data plane jobs log.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CONVERSIONWORKSPACE}} with a real conversionworkspace.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{migrationJob}:generateSshScript
endpoints.description: Generate a SSH configuration script to configure the reverse SSH connectivity.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MIGRATIONJOB}} with a real migrationjob.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{name}
endpoints.description: Gets details of a single private connection.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/{name}
endpoints.description: Deletes a single Database Migration Service private connection.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v1/{name}
endpoints.description: Updates the parameters of a single migration job.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{name}/locations
endpoints.description: Lists information about the supported locations for this service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{name}/operations
endpoints.description: Lists operations that match the specified filter in the request. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `UNIMPLEMENTED`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{name}:apply
endpoints.description: Applies draft tree onto a specific destination database.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{name}:cancel
endpoints.description: Starts asynchronous cancellation on a long-running operation. The server makes a best effort to cancel the operation, but success is not guaranteed. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED`. Clients can use Operations.GetOperation or other methods to check whether the cancellation succeeded or whether the operation completed despite cancellation. On successful cancellation, the operation is not deleted; instead, it becomes an operation with an Operation.error value with a google.rpc.Status.code of 1, corresponding to `Code.CANCELLED`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{name}:commit
endpoints.description: Marks all the data in the conversion workspace as committed.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{name}:convert
endpoints.description: Creates a draft tree schema for the destination database.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{name}:fetchStaticIps
endpoints.description: Fetches a set of static IP addresses that need to be allowlisted by the customer when using the static-IP connectivity method.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{name}:promote
endpoints.description: Promote a migration job, stopping replication to the destination and promoting the destination to be a standalone database.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{name}:restart
endpoints.description: Restart a stopped or failed migration job, resetting the destination instance to its original state and starting the migration process from scratch.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{name}:resume
endpoints.description: Resume a migration job that is currently stopped and is resumable (was stopped during CDC phase).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{name}:rollback
endpoints.description: Rolls back a conversion workspace to the last committed snapshot.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{name}:seed
endpoints.description: Imports a snapshot of the source database into the conversion workspace.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{name}:start
endpoints.description: Start an already created migration job.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{name}:stop
endpoints.description: Stops a running migration job.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{name}:verify
endpoints.description: Verify a migration job, making sure the destination can reach the source and that all configuration and prerequisites are met.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/connectionProfiles
endpoints.description: Retrieves a list of all connection profiles in a given project and location.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{parent}/connectionProfiles
endpoints.description: Creates a new connection profile in a given project and location.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/conversionWorkspaces
endpoints.description: Lists conversion workspaces in a given project and location.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{parent}/conversionWorkspaces
endpoints.description: Creates a new conversion workspace in a given project and location.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{parent}/mappingRules:import
endpoints.description: Imports the mapping rules for a given conversion workspace. Supports various formats of external rules files.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/migrationJobs
endpoints.description: Lists migration jobs in a given project and location.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{parent}/migrationJobs
endpoints.description: Creates a new migration job in a given project and location.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/privateConnections
endpoints.description: Retrieves a list of private connections in a given project and location.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{parent}/privateConnections
endpoints.description: Creates a new private connection in a given project and location.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{resource}:getIamPolicy
endpoints.description: Gets the access control policy for a resource. Returns an empty policy if the resource exists and does not have a policy set.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCE}} with a real resource.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{resource}:setIamPolicy
endpoints.description: Sets the access control policy on the specified resource. Replaces any existing policy. Can return `NOT_FOUND`, `INVALID_ARGUMENT`, and `PERMISSION_DENIED` errors.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCE}} with a real resource.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{resource}:testIamPermissions
endpoints.description: Returns permissions that a caller has on the specified resource. If the resource does not exist, this will return an empty set of permissions, not a `NOT_FOUND` error. Note: This operation is designed to be used for building permission-aware UIs and command-line tools, not for authorization checking. This operation may "fail open" without warning.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCE}} with a real resource.
